title: XMax Announces Strategic Expansion Into Artificial Intelligence to Drive Growth and Diversification
description: LOS ANGELES, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- XMax Inc. (NASDAQ: XWIN, 'XMax” or the 'Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a strategic expansion into artificial intelligence ('AI”) while continuing to operate and develop its existing furniture business. The initiative is designed to diversify revenue streams and position the Company for long-term growth amid challenging conditions in the furniture market.

title: BlackRock flags AI as crypto’s next big use case, not token boom
description: The asset management giant's Robbie Mitchnic said clients are focused on bitcoin, ether and only a few other tokens, and aren't looking for broad exposure. Rather, they see opportunity for crypto in artificial intelligence.
content:
BlackRock’s head of digital assets, Robbie Mitchnick, signaled a shift in how large investors view crypto, pointing to artificial intelligence (AI) as a more meaningful driver than the expansion of new tokens.

title: Anthropic Challenges Pentagon's Risk Designation
description: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic is contesting the Pentagon's classification of it as a supply chain risk. The company argues this action from the Trump administration is a retaliation against their refusal to allow unrestricted military use of their AI technology. A hearing is set in San Francisco.
content: In a high-stakes legal battle, Anthropic, an artificial intelligence company, is seeking to halt the Pentagon's designation of the firm as a supply chain risk. The company faces significant repercussions from the Trump administration over its stance ... [708 chars]

description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. title: Apple plans AI reboot with Siri App, new look in iOS 27
description: The new Siri is slated to be unveiled June 8 at the iPhone maker’s Worldwide Developers Conference as part of a broader artificial intelligence overhaul.
content:
Apple is testing a standalone app for its Siri voice assistant alongside a new “Ask Siri” feature that will work across the company’s software, part of a broader artificial intelligence overhaul.

title: Nvidia chief Jensen Huang says we've achieved AGI. But what on Earth is it?
description: Jensen Huang’s claim that AGI is already here has reignited debate, with experts still divided on what actually qualifies as human level artificial intelligence.
